content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are precisely matched to what's live and sequenced correctly along the AoA path. Turn 2 welcomes the surface question without giving financial advice or challenging the math. Turn 4 pivots from the intellectual frame to felt experience at exactly the moment the client has finished justifying the number. Turn 6 catches the explain-away move in real time and reflects it back — a clean instance of noticing the defense and naming it rather than colluding. Turn 8 doesn't repeat the same move when the client deflects; it sharpens the angle by asking what the math is protecting against. Turn 10 is the key intervention: when the client produces a vulnerable sentence and immediately recovers, the coach asks him to stay with it and explicitly not recover — this is the 'hold the moment' move at the exact right time. Turn 12 keeps the thread on 'this' rather than letting it abstract. Turn 14 lands the pattern softly ('the feeling came first') and asks what it's about, which opens the door to the childhood memory in turn 15. The coach earned each step rather than racing to 'money is a surrogate' as a concept. No financial advice, no money-mindset lecture, no aggressive basic-needs trap.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Welcomes the surface question concretely without giving advice or challenging — earns trust."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Moves from math to felt experience at the right moment ('what do you feel when you imagine stopping')."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the explain-away in real time; doesn't let the discomfort get swept past."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pivots angle when client deflects rather than repeating; asks what the math is protecting from."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "The pivotal hold-the-moment move: 'don't recover from it yet.' Excellent timing — arrives the instant the client tries to recover."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Normalizes ('it didn't come out weird') and stays with the precise word 'this' rather than abstracting."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Softly names the pattern (feeling came first, number hasn't fixed it) and asks origin question — opens childhood material."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting", "same-scarcity-story-regardless-of-wealth"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "notes": "Conversation ends mid-arc at the located childhood moment; the surrogate naming has not yet happened but the felt connection is being located, which is correct sequencing. Coach has not yet evangelized or labeled — appropriately patient."
}
